about.name: I'm Lara
about.bio:
a native Italian teacher and language enthusiast, 

My love for languages has taken me to study, live, and work abroad, from the UK to Russia. Along the way, I've experienced all the ups and downs of learning a foreign language myself: the excitement of your first real conversation, the frustration of forgetting the simplest word, and that amazing feeling when everything finally clicks.

Since 2022, I've been helping students from all over the world build confidence and speak Italian in real-life situations. My lessons are interactive, practical, and relaxed, because making mistakes is part of the journey and speaking is how you improve.

Behind every lesson is a solid academic background in languages and interpreting, along with the DILS-PG Level II certification for teaching Italian as a foreign language. 

What matters most to me is creating lessons you'll actually enjoy and leave feeling more confident than when you joined.

method.section:
Interactive lessons with guided conversations, activities, and games to start using Italian from day one.

**Why they work:**

1. I don't focus on correcting 'mistakes'; instead I guide you step by step.
2. You will learn to correct yourself naturally. building confidence and becoming more independent.
3. Interactive, engaging, and personalized lessons.
4. If needed, I can also explain complex concepts in English, French, or Russian.

results.beginner: **Starting from zero?** In few months you'll be able to handle many everyday situations, ask directions, express needs, desires and simple opinions.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.successMessage: Thanks! I'll get back to you soon.
